title: Decaspermum forsteri

intro: Decaspermum forsteri, also known as the 'Tasmanian pepper bush', is a small, evergreen shrub native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
